Package HWSystem.Devices

Class Device

java.lang.Object
HWSystem.Devices.Device
Direct Known Subclasses:
Display, MotorDriver, Sensor, WirelessIO
public abstract class Device extends Object
Abstract base class for all hardware devices in the system. Provides common functionality and defines the interface that all devices must implement.

This class serves as the foundation for the device hierarchy, ensuring all devices share common behavior and attributes such as protocol communication, state management, and identification.

Since:
1.0

  • Field Details

    • protocol

      protected Protocol protocol
      The communication protocol used by this device. This determines how the device communicates with the system.
      See Also:
      • Protocol

  • Constructor Details

    • Device

      public Device(Protocol protocol, int DevID)
      Constructor for device objects. Initializes a new device with the specified protocol and ID.
      Parameters:
      protocol - Communication protocol used by this device
      DevID - Unique device identifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the device ID is negative

  • Method Details

    • getDevID

      public int getDevID()
      Returns the unique device identifier.
      Returns:
      The device ID as an integer

    • turnOn

      public abstract void turnOn()
      Abstract method to turn on the device. Must be implemented by concrete device classes to define device-specific startup behavior.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the device cannot be turned on

    • turnOff

      public abstract void turnOff()
      Abstract method to turn off the device. Must be implemented by concrete device classes to define device-specific shutdown behavior.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the device cannot be turned off

    • getName

      public abstract String getName()
      Abstract method to get the specific name of the device. Must be implemented by concrete device classes.
      Returns:
      String representing the device name

    • getDevType

      public abstract String getDevType()
      Abstract method to get the type of the device. Must be implemented by concrete device classes. Device types might include "Sensor", "Display", "MotorDriver", etc.
      Returns:
      String representing the device type

    • getState

      public abstract Device.DeviceState getState()
      Abstract method to get the current state of the device. Must be implemented by concrete device classes to report whether the device is currently on or off.
      Returns:
      Current DeviceState (ON/OFF)
      See Also:
      • Device.DeviceState
